stages.concept:
# Unit 074: 동명사의 관용 표현 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **동명사의 관용 표현**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 동명사를 사용하는 관용 표현들을 알아볼게요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **be busy -ing** — ~하느라 바쁘다

> She is busy **studying** for the exam.
> 그녀는 시험 공부하느라 바쁘다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **feel like -ing** — ~하고 싶다

> I feel like **eating** pizza tonight.
> 나는 오늘 밤 피자를 먹고 싶다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **go -ing** — ~하러 가다

> Let's go **shopping** this weekend.
> 이번 주말에 쇼핑하러 가자.

> They went **fishing** last Saturday.
> 그들은 지난 토요일에 낚시하러 갔다.

**Q. 다음 중 짝지어진 의미가 올바르지 않은 것을 고르세요.**
1. be busy -ing — ~하느라 바쁘다
2. feel like -ing — ~하고 싶다
3. go -ing — ~할 가치가 있다 ✅

🧑‍🎓 학생: 'go -ing'는 '~하러 가다' 이고, '~할 가치가 있다'는 'be worth -ing' 죠! 3번이 틀렸어요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정말 훌륭해요! 

👩‍🏫 선생님: **be worth -ing** — ~할 가치가 있다

> This book is worth **reading**.
> 이 책은 읽을 가치가 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **spend + 시간 + -ing** — ~하는 데 시간을 보내다

> He spent two hours **playing** games.
> 그는 게임하는 데 두 시간을 보냈다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **have trouble/difficulty -ing** — ~하는 데 어려움이 있다

> I had trouble **finding** the way.
> 나는 길을 찾는 데 어려움이 있었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **look forward to -ing** — ~하기를 기대하다

> I look forward to **hearing** from you.
> 당신의 연락을 기대합니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **How about -ing / What about -ing** — ~하는 게 어때?

> **How about** going to the movies?
> 영화 보러 가는 게 어때?

🧑‍🎓 학생: 동명사 관용 표현은 통째로 외워야 하는 거군요! be busy -ing, feel like -ing, go -ing, look forward to -ing 등!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 074: 동명사의 관용 표현 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
How about (     ) on a trip to Jeju?
> **정답** going

---

**02.** I am looking forward to ? you.
> **정답** meeting

---

**03.** She is used to ? early.
> **정답** getting up

---

**04.** It is no use ? about the past.
> **정답** worrying

---

**05.** I feel like ? some ice cream.
> **정답** eating

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
How about go to the park?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** go → going

---

**07.** I am looking forward to meet you.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** meet → meeting

---

**08.** She is used to wake up early.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wake → waking

---

**09.** It is no use cry over spilled milk.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cry → crying

---

**10.** I feel like eat something sweet.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** eat → eating

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
영화 보러 가는 게 어때?
How about to the movies?
> **정답** going

---

**12.** 나는 너를 만나기를 기대하고 있다.
I am looking forward to you.
> **정답** meeting (seeing)

---

**13.** 그녀는 혼자 사는 것에 익숙하다.
She is used to alone.
> **정답** living

---

**14.** 불평해 봐야 소용없다.
It is no use .
> **정답** complaining

---

**15.** 나는 산책하고 싶다.
I feel like a walk.
> **정답** taking

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
같이 공부하는 게 어때?
How studying about together
> **정답** How / about / studying / together

---

**17.** 나는 방학을 기대하고 있다.
I am to looking forward having vacation
> **정답** I / am / looking / forward / to / having / vacation

---

**18.** 그는 일찍 일어나는 것에 익숙하다.
He used is to getting up early
> **정답** He / is / used / to / getting / up / early

---

**19.** 후회해도 소용없다.
It no is use regretting
> **정답** It / is / no / use / regretting

---

**20.** 나는 피자를 먹고 싶다.
feel I like eating pizza
> **정답** I / feel / like / eating / pizza
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 074: 동명사의 관용 표현 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Tom felt like to go to a movie tonight.
It is no use complaining about your busy life.
The student has difficulty to talk with English
native speakers.
They were busy studying for the test in the
library.
> **정답** Tom felt like to go to a movie tonight., The student has difficulty to talk with English native speakers.

---

**02.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Tom cannot help to yelling at his son to be
quiet.
Because it's too late, it is no use to telling her
how you feel.
On arriving there, I went straight to the
bathroom.
She is looking forward to hearing from him
soon.
> **정답** Because it's too late, it is no use to telling her how you feel.
> **정답Tom cannot help to yelling at his son to be quiet.

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom wants _________ marketing in college.
Amy is looking forward to _______________ him
again in the future.
studying - meet
to study - meeting
to study - meet
studying - meeting
> **정답** to study - meeting

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
On _______________ the cute kid, Tom couldn't
help _________________ her.
see - to hug
see - hug
see - hugging
seeing - hugging
> **정답** seeing - hugging

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy felt like ____________ something sweet while
she was studying.
So, she asked her mom ___________ cookies.
But her mom was busy _____________ soup.
eating - to bake - making
to eat - to bake - to make
to eat - baking - making
eating - baking - to make
> **정답** eating - to bake - making

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
There is no getting refund for the broken
product.
The woman was busy to taking a note.
He and his brother felt like to grab a light
snack.
Amy is good at hide her feelings.
> **정답** There is no getting refund for the broken product.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The TV show was worth watching.
After the accident, the boy has difficulty to
walk without a crutch.
On heard the news, Amy cried out in
excitement.
It is no use to running now, because the bus
has gone already.
> **정답** The TV show was worth watching.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그들을 용서할 가치가 없다.
It is not worth to forgiving them.
It is not worth forgiving them.
It is not worth of forgiving them.
It is not worth to forgive them.
> **정답** It is not worth forgiving them.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 점심을 많이 먹은 후 낮잠을 자고 싶었다.
Amy felt like taking a nap after heavy lunch.
Amy felt like to taking a nap after heavy lunch.
Amy felt like to take a nap after heavy lunch.
Amy didn't feel like taking a nap after heavy
lunch.
> **정답** Amy felt like taking a nap after heavy lunch.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 가끔 아침에 일찍 일어나는 것이 어렵다.
Amy sometimes has trouble to wake up early
in the morning.
Amy sometimes has trouble waking up early
in the morning.
Amy sometimes has trouble for waking up
early in the morning.
Amy sometimes has trouble to waking up
early in the morning.
> **정답** Amy sometimes has trouble waking up early in the morning.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The police couldn't help believing what the
criminal said.
Tom is looking forward changing the job.
It is no use crying for help.
They spent time discussing some problems.
> **정답** Tom is looking forward changing the job.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
This novel is boring. It is not worth reading.
There is no looking back now.
Amy and Tom have a difficult time to go to
school on time.
There is no going back once you begin
something.
> **정답** Amy and Tom have a difficult time to go to school on time.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Amy felt like to joining the club for no
reason.
What about taking a taxi to the auditorium?
There is no getting out of this mess.
I couldn't help laughing at his new hairstyle.
> **정답** Amy felt like to joining the club for no reason.

---

**14.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
Tom은 소식을 전하지 않을 수 없었다.
Tom couldn't help to deliver
the news.
> **정답** couldn't, help, delivering

---

**15.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
나는 교수에게 이메일을 쓰는데 두 시간을 썼다.
I spent two hours to write
an email to my professor.
> **정답** spent, two hours, writing, an, email

---

**16.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
식사 후에 산책가는 게 어때?
How about go for a
walk after the meal?
> **정답** How, about, going, for, a, walk

---

**17.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
네가 할 수 있는 게 아무것도 없기때문에 걱정해도 소용없
다.
There is no use worrying
about it because there is nothing you can do.
> **정답** It, is, no, use, worrying

---

**18.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때, 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
그는 그에게 맞는 직업을 찾는데 어려움을 겪었다.
He had trouble to find the
right job for himself.
> **정답** had, trouble, finding

---

**19.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
My sister is good at make jokes. On
hearing her say something, I cannot
help laughing hard. I enjoy
spending time to talk with
her. When I am with her, I feel good.
> **정답** making, On, hearing, cannot, help, laughing, spending, time, talking

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
Tom is in trouble because his math grade is bad.
On seeing him, his parents will want
knowing the result. There is
no hiding the result from them. He
cannot help tell them the truth.
He will try to do better on next
exams.
> **정답** On, seeing, to know, is, no, hiding, cannot, help, telling, to do
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 074 동명사의 관용 표현중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그녀는 그에 대한 소식을 듣자마자 눈물을 흘렸다.
힌트 (     ) hear
  (     )  the news about him, she dropped
tear.
정답 On, hearing

---

**02.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
파티에 John을 초대하는 게 어때?
힌트 (     ) invite
  (     )   (     )  John to the party?
정답 What (How), about, inviting

---

**03.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 어젯밤에 숙제하느라 바빴다
힌트 (     ) do one's homework
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  last night.
정답 was, busy, doing, my, homework

---

**04.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀에게서 조언을 얻을 가치가 있다.
힌트 (     ) get advice
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  from her.
정답 It, is, worth, getting, advice

---

**05.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
그 시험에 합격하는 것은 불가능하다.
힌트 (     ) pass
  (     )   (     )   (     )  the exam.
정답 There, is, no, passing

---

**06.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 선물로 새 휴대폰을 받기를 기대하고 있다.
힌트 (     ) receive
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  a new phone
as a gift.
정답 am, looking, forward, to, receiving

---

**07.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 그의 유머에 웃지 않을 수 없었다.
힌트 (     ) laugh at
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  his humor.
정답 couldn't, help, laughing, at

---

**08.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 지난 일요일에 친구들과 쇼핑하러 갔다.
힌트 (     ) shop
I  (     )   (     )  with friends last Sunday.
정답 went, shopping

---

**09.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 아침에 일찍 일어나는 데 익숙하다.
힌트 (     ) wake up
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  early in the
morning.
정답 am, used, to, waking, up

---

**10.** 알맞은 동명사 관용표현을 사용하여 우리말에 맞게 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 나의 개와 산책하고 싶다.
힌트 (     ) like, take a walk
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  with my dog.
정답 feel, like, taking, a, walk

---

# Unit 074: 동명사의 관용 표현 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom felt like to go to a concert tonight.
It is no use complaining about your busy schedule.
The boy has difficulty to talk with foreign visitors.
They were busy studying for the quiz in the classroom.
> 정답: Tom felt like to go to a concert tonight., The boy

---

**02.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom cannot help to yelling at his brother to be quiet.
Because it's too late, it is no use to telling her how you feel.
On arriving there, I went straight to the classroom.
She is looking forward to hearing from him soon.
> 정답: Because it's too late, it is no use to telling her how

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom wants _________ science in college.
Amy is looking forward to _______________ him again in the future.
studying - meet to study - meeting to study - meet studying - meeting
> 정답: to study - meeting

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
On _______________ the cute puppy, Amy couldn't help _________________ it.
see - to hug see - hug see - hugging seeing - hugging
> 정답: seeing - hugging

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom felt like ____________ something sweet while he was studying.
So, he asked his mom ___________ pancakes.
But his mom was busy _____________ dinner.
eating - to make - cooking to eat - to make - to cook to eat - making - cooking eating - making - to cook
> 정답: eating - to make - cooking

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
There is no getting a refund for the damaged item.
The girl was busy to taking notes.
He and his sister felt like to grab a light snack.
Amy is good at hide her emotions.
> 정답: There is no getting a refund for the damaged item.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
The documentary was worth watching.
After the injury, the boy has difficulty to walk without crutches.
On heard the result, Amy cried out in excitement.
It is no use to running now, because the bus has left already.
> 정답: The documentary was worth watching.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그들을 용서할 가치가 없다.
It is not worth to forgiving them.
It is not worth forgiving them.
It is not worth of forgiving them.
It is not worth to forgive them.
> 정답: It is not worth forgiving them.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 점심을 많이 먹은 후 낮잠을 자고 싶었다.
Tom felt like taking a nap after a big lunch.
Tom felt like to taking a nap after a big lunch.
Tom felt like to take a nap after a big lunch.
Tom didn't feel like taking a nap after a big lunch.
> 정답: Tom felt like taking a nap after a big lunch.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
수진은 가끔 아침에 일찍 일어나는 것이 어렵다.
Sujin sometimes has trouble to wake up early in the morning.
Sujin sometimes has trouble waking up early in the morning.
Sujin sometimes has trouble for waking up early in the morning.
Sujin sometimes has trouble to waking up early in the morning.
> 정답: Sujin sometimes has trouble waking up early in the

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
